@daddylongles

25.1K subscribers•1.6K videos
My YouTube channel features performance videos, tutorials and information on anything to do with music, instruments, gear and gadgets! Here you can find helpful videos about the melodeon, anglo concertina, guitar, cigar box guitar, etc. etc. Helpful tabs, music, tutorials and lessons can be found on my website at www.daddylongles.com - more coming soon! Cool Electric Guitar Riff Of The Day #4 - Beautiful minor 9th bending and pulling off riff

Daddy Long Les
Daddy Long Les
•
•
374 8y ago
Daddy Long Les
Daddy Long Les
Beautiful riff featuring bends, hammers and pulls. Played over a minor chord and giving you that minor ninth feel up and down the fretboard. Accurate bending and vibrato. Try it!
